content:
🚨 Urgent Hiring – Work From Home Opportunity! 🚨

We are hiring for the following position:
✅ Freelance HR Recruiter

Qualifications:
🎓 Graduate or MBA
🗣️ Excellent communication skills in English and Hindi are mandatory.

Work Location:
🏠 Work From Home (Remote)

Earnings:
💰 ₹30,000 – ₹1,00,000 per month (In-hand) 

Working Days:
🕙 Full-time | Monday to Saturday

Joining:
🚀 Immediate joiners are preferred.

How to Apply:
If you're interested, like this post, comment "Interested", and send your updated resume via direct message.
📌 Shortlisting starts immediately!
